narrative:
Precinct Newcomerstown #3 (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 584 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
